details.productUrlName: Judith the Scourge Diva Serial Numbered

customAttributes.description:
Other creatures you control get +1/+0.
Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, Judith, the Scourge Diva deals 1 damage to any target.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: She protected Ravnica with the same things that thrilled her fans: courage, charisma, and a grand assortment of spiked chains.
